# ENT-9103

Timeline fixture: `syncretic-descent` qualifier — must render its specific
edge marking, distinct from every other qualifier kind. Also the OPEN-TERMINUS
case: `range_start_year` present, `range_end_year` OMITTED — must render a
terminus-undated stub, never extended to present and never given a fabricated
end (mirrors Manichaeism in the live vault).
